channel.title: OSINT on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in OSINT on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Reconnaissance and Enumeration
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Reconnaissance" , "Enumeration" , "OSINT" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Information Gathering" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master reconnaissance and enumeration for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn OSINT, active and passive recon, enumeration techniques, secrets discovery, and the right tools.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the PT0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Vulnerability Assessment" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Red Team" , "Exploitation" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) study course covering engagement management, reconnaissance and enumeration, vulnerability discovery, attacks and exploits, and post-exploitation and lateral movement.

item.title: Mastering Google Dorks: Unleash Effortless OSINT and Hacking Power
item.category: "SEO" , "Cybersecurity" , "Online Search" , "Google Dorks" , "Open Source Intelligence" , "Hacking Techniques" , "Digital Skills" , "Web Searching" , "Internet Security" , "Data Discovery"
item.description: Discover how to effortlessly enhance your online searches using Google Dorks, the ultimate search power tool, and find hidden treasures of information with ease. Uncover vulnerabilities, gather OSINT, and stay ahead of the game.

item.title: Automate OSINT with Shodan PowerShell Modules
item.category: "OSINT" , "automation" , "Shodan" , "PowerShell" , "API" , "enumeration" , "exploits" , "network scanning" , "cybersecurity" , "information gathering" , "cyber defense" , "cyber threat intelligence" , "pentesting" , "penetration testing" , "network security" , "threat hunting" , "Shodan API" , "Shodan PowerShell" , "PowerShell Modules" , "cyber reconnaissance"
item.description: Learn to automate OSINT with the Shodan PowerShell Modules collection, which provides an interface to interact with the Shodan API for various functions such as hostname resolution, exploit searching, and more.
